headlines.title: Senate passes sweeping housing affordability bill with bipartisan support
headlines.description: The bipartisan legislation was crafted in both chambers and must now pass the House. It seeks to build more homes and prevent large investors from outbidding families.

headlines.title: ‘Les Bleus’ vuelven a hacer calentamiento tras suspensión del partido
headlines.description: En una cancha encharcada, regresa la selección de Francia para calentar tras la suspensión de una hora y media del partido por causa de una tormenta eléctrica en la zona conurbada de Filadelfia, EE.UU.

headlines.title: Lionel Messi breaks record for most career World Cup goals
headlines.description: Lionel Messi has broken the record for the most career goals at the World Cup by scoring in Argentina's game against Austria.

headlines.title: Miami welcomes Scotland fans and 'Tartan Army' ahead of World Cup match
headlines.description: NBC News' Jesse Kirsch reports from South Beach on Scottish fans taking over Miami ahead of Wednesday's Scotland vs. Brazil World Cup match.

headlines.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks
headlines.description: “Even during wartime, people would still spend time together and try to enjoy life. What else could we do? Life had to go on,” one fan said.

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: What will Messi, Mbappé and Haaland do for an encore?
headlines.description: Last week, Argentina’s Lionel Messi, France’s Kylian Mbappé and Norway’s Erling Haaland scored a combined seven goals on the same day.

headlines.title: Inside Iran, World Cup team brings joy despite uncertainty around U.S. peace talks
headlines.description: “Even during wartime, people would still spend time together and try to enjoy life. What else could we do? Life had to go on,” one fan said.

headlines.title: ‘Country Roads’ is taking the World Cup by storm
headlines.description: World Cup fans were united this weekend by a song synonymous with belonging, nostalgia and the yearning for home

headlines.description: En una cancha encharcada, regresa la selección de Francia para calentar tras la suspensión de una hora y media del partido por causa de una tormenta eléctrica en la zona conurbada de Filadelfia, EE.UU.

headlines.title: Noruega ya partió rumbo al Estadio de Nueva York para enfrentar a Senegal
headlines.description: La Selección de Noruega dejó su hotel de concentración y emprendió el viaje hacia el Estadio de Nueva York, donde se medirá ante Senegal en un duelo clave de la Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026.

headlines.title: Argentina juega para Messi y sueña en grande | Conexión Mundial
headlines.description: En Conexión Mundial, los analistas destacan la actualidad de Messi, las declaraciones de Emiliano Martínez sobre el gran presente de Argentina. El arquero elogió el trabajo colectivo, la solidez defensiva y el respaldo del equipo a Lionel Messi.
